user_prompt: Multi-Agent Orchestration Architecture: A hub-and-spoke diagram showing Claude Code sub-agent system. Central hub: Parent Agent with full context. Spokes going to: 1. Explore Agent (read-only tools, quick/medium/thorough modes, light blue). 2. Plan Agent (read-only + plan file, design focus, green). 3. General Purpose Agent (all tools, full capability, purple). 4. Custom Agent (user-defined via .md file, orange). 5. Fork Agent (implicit, inherits parent context, gray dashed). Each spoke shows: isolated messages=[], independent token budget, permission mode. Between agents: SendMessageTool arrows. Bottom: Coordinator/Swarm system with TeamCreate/TeamDelete. Worktree isolation shown as separate git branches. Modern architecture diagram style, clean lines.

iterations.prompt:
Create a high-quality scientific diagram with these requirements:

VISUAL QUALITY:
- Clean white or light background (no textures or gradients)
- High contrast for readability and printing
- Professional, publication-ready appearance
- Sharp, clear lines and text
- Adequate spacing between elements to prevent crowding

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Clear, readable sans-serif fonts (Arial, Helvetica style)
- Minimum 10pt font size for all labels
- Consistent font sizes throughout
- All text horizontal or clearly readable
- No overlapping text

SCIENTIFIC STANDARDS:
- Accurate representation of concepts
- Clear labels for all components
- Include scale bars, legends, or axes where appropriate
- Use standard scientific notation and symbols
- Include units where applicable

ACCESSIBILITY:
- Colorblind-friendly color palette (use Okabe-Ito colors if using color)
- High contrast between elements
- Redundant encoding (shapes + colors, not just colors)
- Works well in grayscale

LAYOUT:
- Logical flow (left-to-right or top-to-bottom)
- Clear visual hierarchy
- Balanced composition
- Appropriate use of whitespace
- No clutter or unnecessary decorative elements

IMPORTANT - NO FIGURE NUMBERS:
- Do NOT include "Figure 1:", "Fig. 1", or any figure numbering in the image
- Do NOT add captions or titles like "Figure: ..." at the top or bottom
- Figure numbers and captions are added separately in the document/LaTeX
- The diagram should contain only the visual content itself


USER REQUEST: Multi-Agent Orchestration Architecture: A hub-and-spoke diagram showing Claude Code sub-agent system. Central hub: Parent Agent with full context. Spokes going to: 1. Explore Agent (read-only tools, quick/medium/thorough modes, light blue). 2. Plan Agent (read-only + plan file, design focus, green). 3. General Purpose Agent (all tools, full capability, purple). 4. Custom Agent (user-defined via .md file, orange). 5. Fork Agent (implicit, inherits parent context, gray dashed). Each spoke shows: isolated messages=[], independent token budget, permission mode. Between agents: SendMessageTool arrows. Bottom: Coordinator/Swarm system with TeamCreate/TeamDelete. Worktree isolation shown as separate git branches. Modern architecture diagram style, clean lines.

Generate a publication-quality scientific diagram that meets all the guidelines above.

early_stop_reason: Quality score 7.5 meets threshold 7.5 for report
